title: Iconic Wands
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/V3ak-m0Y2Xw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![infographic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aX20EUzO/images/f35d679b73c1853cd8294cfdfa82eb47cbe3f247.png)

Create your own Wand with the Wand Crafting Bench.
Thousands of Combinations!
Custom Crafting bench that displays in real time!
Display your wand for all to see in the Display stand!

All wand models and textures are generated automatically at runtime. This means you can add an infinite amount of parts by editing the config.

Supports Patchouli!

Certain Combinations of parts create wands with unique effects!
